title: pedilonum mitriferum
intro: Pedilonum mitriferum is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae, commonly known as staff vine or staff tree. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like boils and eczema. Pedilonum mitriferum can be prepared as an infusion or decoction by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
